scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules backend/node_modules frontend/node_modules backend/dist frontend/.next frontend/out frontend/.open-next coverage '**/*.tsbuildinfo' backend/package-lock.json frontend/package-lock.json backend/bun.lock frontend/bun.lock
scripts.build: pnpm --filter vc-screener-backend run build && pnpm --filter rtp-global run build
